description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a deer, featuring a robust, rounded body with a rich brown coloration accented by white patches on its back, legs, and underbelly. Its head is adorned with a large, intricate set of antlers that branch out symmetrically, giving it a majestic appearance. The deer has a short, bushy tail and slender legs ending in clearly defined hooves. Its ears are pointed and upright, positioned alertly on either side of the head. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, mimicking the sheen of a healthy animal's coat. The overall form is naturalistic, capturing the anatomy and posture of a deer standing attentively.
description: A realistic brown deer with large antlers, white markings, and a smooth, glossy surface, standing in an alert posture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deer's full body profile, large antlers, pointed ears, and white markings on the back and legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetry of the antlers, the narrow face, and the alignment of the legs and hooves.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, displaying the other profile of the deer, antlers, and body markings.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded hindquarters, short bushy tail, and the white pattern extending down the back and legs.
